trending_themes.evidence: 4th mini album; 'It's Me' title track reached No.1 China Apple Music, No.11 YouTube global; 410,000+ week-one sales
Debut single 'Magnetic' hit 800M Spotify streams as of May 28, 2026 — fastest K-pop debut song to reach this milestone
Topped Instiz chart for 2nd and 3rd weeks of May 2026; most streamed 5th gen K-pop group on Spotify 2026 (419M+)
Hosted festival May 5 with 24,000 attendees; pop-up at HYBE May 3-8

annotation_hooks: 'Magnetic' as a metaphor for irresistible attraction mirrors their chart performance — the song literally pulls listeners in
The album title MAMIHLAPINATAPAI (an untranslatable Yaghan word for a wordless mutual longing) makes for extraordinary annotation material about cross-cultural lyrical concepts
ILLIT's ascent within HYBE parallels BTS's early growth — annotations can draw parallels to BTS's 'No More Dream' ambition-under-constraint themes
raw_headlines: ILLIT tops Instiz chart 2nd and 3rd weeks May 2026
ILLIT Seoul Children's Grand Park Festival 24,000 attendees
